response.justification: Bogdan has solid breadth across roughly 20 years of hands-on software engineering and some recent exposure to AI-agent tooling (MCP frameworks, agentic workflows), but the role demands a Director-level individual contributor who can drive AI strategy, advise enterprise customers, and represent recognized thought leadership in AI. His career arc is that of a senior/staff-level implementer, not a strategic IC; there is no evidence of customer advisory work, product-level AI platform ownership, or the kind of industry-recognized AI expertise the role requires. The entrepreneurial angle (GISCollective) is a modest positive, but the seniority and AI-depth gaps are too significant to overcome.
strengths: ~20 years of continuous software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains, satisfying the minimum tenure requirement
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP (Model Context Protocol) code generators at re:cinq, showing awareness of emerging agentic patterns
Demonstrated entrepreneurial initiative through founding and sustaining GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform used in production
concerns: No advanced degree; the role explicitly prefers a Master's or PhD in an AI-related field, and Bogdan holds only a Bachelor's in CS
Career trajectory is hands-on senior/staff implementation with no documented advisory, thought-leadership, or strategic customer-facing experience at director level
AI expertise is shallow and recent; no demonstrated ownership of a production AI product or platform, nor any public recognition (publications, keynotes, patents) in the AI space
